metadata.name: Adjust Production Schedule for Rush Order

description: Sales has accepted a high-priority rush order that must be inserted into an already full production schedule.

nodes.task_description: Review the new rush order's required completion date and volume.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the order details and deadline.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the current production schedule to find a lower-priority order that can be postponed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a 'make-to-stock' order that can be delayed with minimal impact.

nodes.task_description: Reschedule the lower-priority order and insert the new rush order into the now-vacant slot.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the production schedule to accommodate the rush order.
